task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Modern Home in Denver CO (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $1650000.00 and wholesale is $1320000.00. Product features: 4-bedroom eco-friendly home with solar panels and mountain views. Reference: https://www.redfin.com/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Modern Home in Denver CO. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Modern Home in Denver CO. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
